welcome.title: Your Soul Fingerprint
welcome.subtitle: 10 minutes that change everything
welcome.description:
The better we know you — the more accurate and personal your matches will be.
Your Soul Fingerprint is your real profile — not a list of data, but who you actually are.

whyMatters.title: Why does this matter?
whyMatters.point1: The system builds a unique profile from hundreds of parameters
whyMatters.point2: Matches you receive will be tailored to you personally — not just data points
whyMatters.point3: Our matchmakers will know you on a much deeper level

welcome.privacy: Your answers are stored securely and used only for matching purposes

landingPage.title: Your Soul Fingerprint
landingPage.subtitle: Get to know you — really
landingPage.description: Our technology analyzes hundreds of unique parameters to understand who you truly are — not just data, but personality, values, dreams and lifestyle. That's how we find a real match.

feature1.title: Who I really am
feature1.description: 8 deep sections that paint your personality

feature2.title: What I'm looking for
feature2.description: Not just data — values, energy and worldview

feature3.title: Precise matching
feature3.description: The system uses your Soul Fingerprint to find the best match

identity.title: Identity & Background
identity.subtitle: Who you are and where you come from

family.title: Family & Home Vision
family.subtitle: The home you want to build

labels.partnerSectionIntro: Now — what are you looking for?
labels.partnerSectionSubtitle: Same question, but about your partner

completion.title: Your Soul Fingerprint is ready!
completion.subtitle: A unique profile that represents who you are
completion.description:
Based on your answers, the system can offer you more accurate and personal matches.
Our matchmakers will know you on a deep level.
completion.tagsTitle: Here's what we discovered about you:

anchor_sector.subtitle: Choose what describes you best — there's no right or wrong answer

anchor_sector_hasidic.subtitle: Choose the stream you identify with

anchor_sector_diaspora.subtitle: We want to understand your community background

anchor_life_stage.subtitle: This will help us tailor the questions for you

s1_charedi_study_work.text: What best describes your current occupation?
s1_charedi_study_work.subtitle: No judgment — every path is worthy and beautiful

s1_charedi_military.text: Did you serve in the military?
s1_charedi_military.subtitle: Some Haredi individuals choose to serve — all choices are respected

s1_dl_army_type.text: What type of service did you complete?

s1_dl_service_f.text: What did you do after studies?

s1_dl_yeshiva_type.text: What type of yeshiva did you study at?
s1_dl_yeshiva_type.subtitle: This gives us insight into your background

s1_dl_zionism.text: What does Zionism represent to you?

s1_shomer_negiah.text: What is your approach to shomer negiah?
s1_shomer_negiah.subtitle: An important question for matching — all approaches are respected

s1_masorti_practices.text: What traditions are important to you to keep?
s1_masorti_practices.subtitle: Choose as many as fit

anchor_sector.charedi_modern_sub: Working, learning — Haredi but engaged with society
anchor_sector.hardal_sub: National Haredi — Torah and strong Zionism
anchor_sector.datlash_sub: Grew up religious, less observant today
anchor_sector.chozer_bteshuva_sub: In the process of returning to faith and mitzvot
anchor_sector.masorti_medium_sub: Holidays, brit, bar mitzvah — tradition at home

anchor_sector_hasidic.chabad_sub: Shlichus and love of all Jews
anchor_sector_hasidic.breslov_sub: Joy, personal prayer, Rosh Hashana in Uman

anchor_sector_diaspora.ivy_league_jewish: Ivy League with strong Jewish background

anchor_life_stage.returning: Returning to dating after a long break

s1_charedi_study_work.full_kollel: Learning in kollel full-time — Torah is my life
s1_charedi_study_work.kollel_part: Learning in kollel and working part-time
s1_charedi_study_work.works_only: Working — learning in my free time

s1_charedi_study_work_f.homemaker: Homemaker — the home is my world

s1_dl_army_type.kav: Kav yeshiva — one year yeshiva after army

s1_dl_yeshiva_type.hesder_yeshiva: Hesder yeshiva — combining Torah and army
s1_dl_yeshiva_type.hesder_sub: e.g.: Har Etzion, Shaalvim, Kerem B'Yavneh
s1_dl_yeshiva_type.kav_yeshiva: Kav yeshiva — one year after the army
s1_dl_yeshiva_type.kav_sub: e.g.: Eli, Siach Yitzchak, Merkaz HaRav, Ramot

s1_dl_zionism.strong_zionist: Ideological Zionist — Eretz Yisrael is central
s1_dl_zionism.pragmatic_zionist: Pragmatic Zionist — here because this is home
s1_dl_zionism.eretz_israel_focus: Eretz Yisrael focus — not necessarily the state as is

s1_shomer_negiah.mostly_shomer: Trying to keep it — not strict about everything
s1_shomer_negiah.not_shomer_open: Not shomer — open to a shomer partner
s1_shomer_negiah.not_shomer_prefer: Not shomer — prefer partner who is also not

s1_bt_path.encounter: An encounter with Judaism that moved me
s1_bt_path.life_event: A life event that made me search for meaning

s1_diaspora_aliyah.planning_soon: Yes — planning to make aliyah soon
s1_diaspora_aliyah.open_if_right: Open if it's with the right person

s2_family_extended.very_close: Very close — Shabbat together, always in touch

s2_family_atmosphere.warm_vibrant: Warm and vibrant — always people, food, life
s2_family_atmosphere.quiet_intimate: Quiet and intimate — quality over quantity

s3_character_primary.analytical: Analytical — thinks in order and numbers
s3_character_primary.empathetic: Empathetic — picks up on others' emotions

s3_life_tempo.fast_full: Fast and full — many things in parallel
s3_life_tempo.slow_intentional: Slow and intentional — less but quality

s3_conflict.consensus: Consensus-builder — looks for solution for all

s3_social_role.center: Center of the group — initiator and alive
s3_social_role.active_member: Active member — one of the crowd
s3_social_role.side_supporter: Supporting from the side — there but not leading

s4_ambition.career_center: Career is central — building something big
s4_ambition.professional_good: Good professional — not aiming for greatness
s4_ambition.balance: Balance — work matters but isn't everything
s4_ambition.livelihood_only: Just livelihood — home is what matters

s4_financial_style.experiential: Spender on experiences — experience over savings
s4_financial_style.generous: Generous — happy to give to others

s4_partner_career.balance_family: Important they can balance with family
s4_partner_career.whatever_happy: Most important that they're happy in what they do

s5_kashrut.kosher_home_not_out: Kosher at home, less strict outside

s5_travel_frequency.loves_frequent: Love it — several times a year

s5_pets.loves_has: Love them — have one / want one

s6_children_count.have_enough: Have children and don't want more

s6_home_roles.traditional: Traditional division — he earns, she manages
s6_home_roles.she_works_too: He's primary earner, she works too

s6_parenting_style.supportive: Supportive and protective — there when needed
s6_parenting_style.educating: Educator and guide — tradition and discipline
s6_parenting_style.free_developing: Free — child will develop on their own

s6_home_atmosphere.private_family: Private home — ours and the children's
s6_home_atmosphere.lively_noisy: Lively and noisy home, full of energy

s6_partner_children.open_yes: Yes — open to a partner with children
s6_partner_children.prefer_without: Prefer no children from previous marriage

s6_blended_family.full_parent: Expecting them to be a full parent to my children
s6_blended_family.supportive_role: Supportive role — not a full parent
s6_blended_family.respectful_distance: Respect and distance — they are my children
s6_blended_family.figure_out_together: We'll figure it out — no fixed expectation

s7_relationship_meaning.partnership_build: Partnership — together we'll build something great
s7_relationship_meaning.love_emotion: Love and emotion — open and feeling heart
s7_relationship_meaning.home_stability: Home and stability — a safe place
s7_relationship_meaning.mutual_respect: Mutual respect — preserving each other's self
s7_relationship_meaning.support_each_other: Support — being there for each other

s7_love_language.words_affirmation: Words of affirmation — hearing and saying
s7_love_language.acts_of_service: Acts of service — doing for each other
s7_love_language.gifts: Gifts and gestures — the little surprises

s7_closeness.very_close: Very close — want to do everything together
s7_closeness.balanced: Balanced — together and also each their own

s7_meeting_pace.fast: Fast — know after a few meetings

s7_relationship_model.traditional_roles: Traditional roles — he leads, she supports
s7_relationship_model.she_leads: She leads — she's the strong one
s7_relationship_model.pragmatic_stable: Pragmatic and stable — love through action

s3_sensitivity.balanced_sensitivity: Balanced — room for both emotion and logic

s4_money_attitude.money_important: Money is important — financial security is paramount
s4_money_attitude.money_tool: Money is a tool — used for creating a good life
s4_money_attitude.money_secondary: Money is secondary — there are more important things
s4_money_attitude.money_spiritual: Money is a test — how you relate to it reveals character

s5_fitness.very_active: Very active — regular sports are part of life

p_politics.similar_range: Important to be in the same general direction

p_diet_pref.same_as_me: Yes, important they eat like me
